ksa_text: Skill in writing technical documentation for data systems, including architecture diagrams, API specifications, operational runbooks, data dictionaries, and troubleshooting guides that enable team independence.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting reviews of technical systems.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Skill in conducting reviews of technical systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA TF-S-011 (TF, Skill) maps to Bioinformatics Technician scope as moderate fit. Composite score 0.4607 clears the moderate fit threshold of 0.43. Top framework anchors: nist_ai_rmf=0.461, eu_ai_act=0.431, onet=0.426. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within bioinformatics analysis, genomic data processing, and life sciences analytics.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4607 for moderate fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA TF-S-011 (TF, composite 0.4607) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Survey of O*NET 15-2051.00 tools/technology section; DCWF technical foundations competencies for analytics work roles does not surface this TF-domain content as a core or common requirement for IC-to-senior-IC data analyst roles. Score 0.4607 may reflect incidental framework overlap. Without direct analytics-domain text confirmation, external ground truth does not support inclusion at this signal level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include overturned. Insufficient external evidence for TF domain content at composite 0.4607 without confirming text signals. Revised to exclude.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P4 external ground truth. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.4607, domain TF. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
